narration: Mitosis copies body cells; meiosis creates gametes with half the chromosomes.
visual_description: Hook visual: Mitosis copies body cells; meiosis creates gametes with half the chromosomes.
ai_image_prompt: Hook visual: Mitosis copies body cells; meiosis creates gametes with half the chromosomes.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Hook visual: Mitosis copies body cells; meiosis creates gametes with half the chromosomes.

narration: Both processes are vital for life. But why do they matter?
visual_description: Context visual: Both processes are vital for life. But why do they matter?
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: Both processes are vital for life. But why do they matter?
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: Both processes are vital for life. But why do they matter?

narration: Mitosis is all about growth and repair, duplicating cells perfectly.
visual_description: Escalation visual: Mitosis is all about growth and repair, duplicating cells perfectly.
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: Mitosis is all about growth and repair, duplicating cells perfectly.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: Mitosis is all about growth and repair, duplicating cells perfectly.

narration: Meiosis, however, halves the chromosome number, creating genetic diversity.
visual_description: Evidence visual: Meiosis, however, halves the chromosome number, creating genetic diversity.
ai_image_prompt: Evidence visual: Meiosis, however, halves the chromosome number, creating genetic diversity.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Evidence visual: Meiosis, however, halves the chromosome number, creating genetic diversity.

narration: This means meiosis is key for evolution—new traits, new possibilities.
